VOLCANIC ACTIVITY & ROLLING HILLS TESTROOM

BOO! Battle of Origins — Spiritkin Testing Lab
Spiritkin Gallery
Arena

💎 Specials

Moonstone (after rolling): Change ONE die to any value (1-6). You may only hold 1 at a time.
Lucky Stone (after rolling): Discard to reroll one die.
Surge (before rolling): Versatile energy resource. Spend to power ghost abilities.
Healing Seed (before rolling): Heal 1 HP. Cannot exceed max HP.
Ice Shard (before rolling): Adds +1 damage to a winning roll. Stacks across shards.
Sacred Fire (before rolling): Adds +3 damage to a winning roll. Stacks across fires.
Burn 🔥 — Place on enemy sideline ghosts before rolling. When the burned ghost enters play, it takes damage equal to its burn count. Stacks. Consumed on entry.
Magic Fireflies ✨ — Before rolling, trade 1 Firefly for any resource of your choice. You may only hold 1 at a time.

⚔️ Items (permanent, toggle on/off before rolling)
Ice Blade — Crafted by Zain (1 Ice Shard + 1 Moonstone). +1 die and +2 damage on wins when swinging. One per game.
Flame Blade — Crafted by Finn (2 Healing Seeds + 1 Sacred Fire). +1 die and +3 Burn on wins when swinging. One per game.
☀️ Mask of Day — Crafted by Sophia (win with no damage). Gain 1 Burn for each 1 or 2 you roll. One per game.
🌙 Mask of Night — Crafted by Sophia (win with no damage). Roll the same number of dice as the enemy. +1 damage on wins. One per game.
